answerToWhatGame: 1940340
audioFaults: no
concludingNotes: Nothing to really note, I selected Proton Experimental, launched the game, and played for a long while without any issues. I've entered every zone as far as I can tell and reached the final boss twice, so I'm fairly certain the game is completely stable.

The game doesn't support cloud saves yet (coming in a later update) so do be careful with changing Proton versions, as this might replace your compatdata folder and as a result delete your save file.
